name: cold-flu-home-recovery-log
description: Create a short-term home illness log with symptom timeline, temperature entries, hydration and rest notes, medication timing as user-entered facts, red-flag checklist, and clinician-ready summary.

triggers: Create a cold or flu symptom log
Prepare a symptom summary for a clinic
Make a caregiver handoff for someone sick at home
inputRequirements: Age group and household context if relevant
Sleep, hydration, appetite, rest, and energy notes
User-entered medication or care-action timing if available

constraints.safetyNotice: This skill is an illness tracking and communication aid only. It does not diagnose, treat, prescribe, recommend medication changes, or replace professional medical care. Seek urgent medical guidance for red flags or any serious concern.
